summary: Iteration 6 testing complete. All 7 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Theme Picker moved to Settings page with 5 themes (Light, Dark, Forest, Ocean, Sand), APK Download section with 'Coming soon' badge, ThemePicker removed from sidebar, Accounts page shows Sync Email and History buttons for accounts with email_filter, Sync History dialog works correctly, detect-transfers endpoint returns confidence field (high/medium).

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning)

passed_tests: POST /api/detect-transfers returns potential_transfers with 'confidence' field (high/medium)
GET /api/accounts/{account_id}/sync-history returns array of sync logs
POST /api/accounts/{account_id}/sync rejects accounts without email_filter (400)
POST /api/accounts/{account_id}/sync works for accounts with email_filter
GET /api/accounts returns accounts with email_filter field
GET /api/auth/me works with valid token
GET /api/auth/me returns 401 without token
Settings page: Theme Picker section with 5 themes (Light, Dark, Forest, Ocean, Sand)
Settings page: Active theme shows checkmark indicator
Settings page: APK Download section with 'Download APK' button
Settings page: 'Coming soon' badge visible
Settings page: Theme switching works (Dark theme changes --app-bg to #111111)
App sidebar: ThemePicker NOT in sidebar (theme-toggle-btn removed)
Accounts page: Cards with email_filter show 'Sync Email' button
Accounts page: Cards with email_filter show 'History' button
Accounts page: 'History' button opens Sync History dialog
Accounts page: Sync History dialog shows empty message when no history
Transactions page: Detect Transfers button works
Transactions page: Potential Transfers tab shows count
Transactions page: Confidence badge code in place (data-testid='transfer-confidence-{idx}')
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 verified: (1) Theme Picker moved from sidebar to Settings page - 5 themes available with data-testid='theme-setting-{key}' (light, dark, forest, ocean, sand). (2) APK Download section on Settings page with data-testid='download-apk-btn' and 'Coming soon' badge. (3) Accounts with email_filter show 'Sync Email' (data-testid='sync-account-{id}') and 'History' (data-testid='sync-history-{id}') buttons. (4) Sync History dialog shows logs from GET /api/accounts/{id}/sync-history. (5) POST /api/detect-transfers returns confidence field (high/medium) - frontend shows badge with data-testid='transfer-confidence-{idx}'. IMAP email sync will fail in test env (no real email server) - expected behavior.
